themes.label: Grace
themes.summary: Romans 8 roots assurance in God’s saving action rather than human performance. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 4 verses. Commentary leans on "Thomas Aquinas on Commentary on Romans: After showing that we are freed from sin and the law...". Cross references echo "Love".

3: God has done what the law
39: love of God in Christ Jesus our Lord
